MODULE: cosmos.ui.streamlit_app
FILE: cosmos/ui/streamlit_app.py (977 lines)
CATEGORY: ui

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Streamlit UI - Interactive Dashboard

Provides a comprehensive visual interface for:
- Chat with memory-augmented responses
- Real-time memory visualization
- Knowledge graph exploration
- Evolution metrics dashboard
- Agent activity monitoring

Novel Features:
- Live memory activation heatma

CLASSES:
- cosmosUI: Main Streamlit application for cosmos.

Provides real-time visualization and int
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: def run(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_app(data_dir: str='./data') -> cosmosUI
- def main()
